title: senecio maritimus
intro: Senecio maritimus, also known as Grey Ragwort, is a perennial plant species native to coastal areas of Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter and antispasmodic agent, used to treat digestive issues and relieve muscle spasms. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, Grey Ragwort has been prepared in herbal remedies such as teas and infusions, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
